toolPurpose: Search for tracks on SoundCloud by query string with optional filtering by genre, limit, and pagination offset.

query.description: Search query string to find tracks (artist name, track title, or keywords)

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (default: 10, max: 200)

offset.description: Pagination offset for result set (for retrieving subsequent pages)

genres.description: Comma-separated genre filter(s) to narrow results (e.g., 'electronic,hip-hop,pop')

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed metadata about a specific track including title, duration, playback count, likes, genre, and stream URL.

track_id.description: Unique SoundCloud track ID to retrieve metadata for

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed user profile information including username, follower count, track count, and avatar URL.

user_id.description: Unique SoundCloud user ID to retrieve profile information for

toolPurpose: Retrieve all tracks uploaded by a specific user with pagination support for result limiting and offset.

user_id.description: Unique SoundCloud user ID to retrieve tracks from

limit.description: Maximum number of tracks to return (default: 10, max: 200)

toolPurpose: Retrieve detailed playlist information including track listing, metadata, and composition details from a playlist ID.

playlist_id.description: Unique SoundCloud playlist ID to retrieve information and tracks from
